allOf.title: windows10MobileCompliancePolicy

bitLockerEnabled.description: Require devices to be reported healthy by Windows Device Health Attestation - bit locker is enabled

codeIntegrityEnabled.description: Require devices to be reported as healthy by Windows Device Health Attestation.

earlyLaunchAntiMalwareDriverEnabled.description: Require devices to be reported as healthy by Windows Device Health Attestation - early launch antimalware driver is enabled.

passwordBlockSimple.description: Whether or not to block syncing the calendar.

passwordExpirationDays.description: Number of days before password expiration. Valid values 1 to 255

passwordMinimumCharacterSetCount.description: The number of character sets required in the password.

passwordMinimumLength.description: Minimum password length. Valid values 4 to 16

passwordMinutesOfInactivityBeforeLock.description: Minutes of inactivity before a password is required.

passwordPreviousPasswordBlockCount.description: The number of previous passwords to prevent re-use of.

passwordRequired.description: Require a password to unlock Windows Phone device.

passwordRequireToUnlockFromIdle.description: Require a password to unlock an idle device.

secureBootEnabled.description: Require devices to be reported as healthy by Windows Device Health Attestation - secure boot is enabled.

allOf.description: This class contains compliance settings for Windows 10 Mobile.
